SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-08-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY JUDGMENT CREDITOR $50.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING ON DECEMBER 4, 2012 AND CONTINNUING UNTIL THE FULL AMOUNT OF $1,920.00 IS PAID", JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JASON RAM--BRANCH MANAGER. DEFENDANT ANDRES FERRO MEDRA INFORMED THE COURT THAT HE HAD APPEARED, INSTEAD OF LAZARO MEDRANO, AS HE IS THE OWNER OF THE CAR AND NOT LAZARO MEDRANO. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES, EXCEPT DEFENDANT LAZARO MEDRANO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
